narrative:
Precinct Mogadore Village (precinct in Portage County) has 742 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
